rationale: Section 10 restricts wholesale release of geographic areas from taxes, not partial exemptions on individual homesteads. Homestead exemptions are independently authorized by Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b, which controls.
quote: The Legislature shall have no power to release the inhabitants of, or property in, any county, city or town from the payment of taxes levied for State or County purposes
_note: Section 10 addresses geographic release of tax obligations, not individual homestead exemptions; art. VIII, §1-b separately authorizes residence homestead exemptions.
